additive_residual.causal_interpretation: UNAVAILABLE: residuals cannot distinguish interaction from experiment, control-type, or guide-burden differences.
additive_residual.definition: measured triple effect minus the unit-coefficient sum of constituent-single effects

claim_contract.claim_ceiling: Descriptive negative stress test of whether one measured FAS + RC3H1 + SUV39H1 triple is represented by target-matched constituent singles across confounded experimental/control designs.
claim_contract.confounding: Single-versus-triple status is inseparable from experiment, control type, and guide burden; biological interpretation is inconclusive.
claim_contract.inference: No p-values, confidence intervals, or donor-population tests are emitted.
not_claimed: same-guide matching between triple and constituent singles

certificate.scope: model-relative to this measured atom cone and masked gene metric

lodo_component_cone.leakage_contract: fold mask uses training-donor controls only; coefficients do not read the held triple; scoring remains conditional on author-normalized matrix values and the held donor's measured constituent singles

lodo_training_selected_best_single.selection_contract: identity and scale selected on stacked training donors only and frozen before application to the held donor

on_target_calibrated_component_cone.scoring_contract: coefficients fit only on the three on-target coordinates, then frozen and scored on the disjoint target-masked transcriptome

certificate.scope: model-relative to this measured atom cone and masked gene metric

filter_sensitivity.conclusion: Component-cone alignment changes materially across the declared control-only expression thresholds; no threshold rescues the geometric model.

0.5.conclusion: At control-mean CPM >= 0.5, 17407 target-masked genes remain; median component-cone cosine/nRMSE=0.069586/0.997359 and median equal-sum cosine/nRMSE=0.056365/2.287023. This remains a confounded cross-experiment descriptive stress test.

1.conclusion: At control-mean CPM >= 1, 14577 target-masked genes remain; median component-cone cosine/nRMSE=0.094921/0.995192 and median equal-sum cosine/nRMSE=0.064613/2.308400. This remains a confounded cross-experiment descriptive stress test.

10.conclusion: At control-mean CPM >= 10, 8451 target-masked genes remain; median component-cone cosine/nRMSE=0.199913/0.977412 and median equal-sum cosine/nRMSE=0.115385/2.257696. This remains a confounded cross-experiment descriptive stress test.

2.conclusion: At control-mean CPM >= 2, 12469 target-masked genes remain; median component-cone cosine/nRMSE=0.117774/0.992568 and median equal-sum cosine/nRMSE=0.079991/2.318522. This remains a confounded cross-experiment descriptive stress test.

5.conclusion: At control-mean CPM >= 5, 10269 target-masked genes remain; median component-cone cosine/nRMSE=0.155529/0.987426 and median equal-sum cosine/nRMSE=0.106447/2.303826. This remains a confounded cross-experiment descriptive stress test.

filter_sensitivity.selection_contract: Each mask uses only the 12 declared controls, never perturbation outcomes.

interpretation.claim_boundary: Execution succeeded, but the declared geometric model fails. This is a negative cross-experiment stress test, not combination/additivity validation, an interaction test, or biological reachability evidence.
interpretation.text: The in-sample component cone reaches median cosine 0.095, only descriptively, while the equal-sum model has median cosine 0.065 and normalized RMSE 2.308. LODO median cosine is 0.088 versus 0.096 for the training-selected best single. On-target-frozen potency scoring reaches median transcriptome cosine 0.069. Low donor reproducibility and expression-filter sensitivity, together with perfect single/triple experiment-control-guide burden confounding, make the biological result inconclusive.

metadata_conflict.claim_effect: No time-course or duration claim is made.
metadata_conflict.resolution_basis: The sample titles, paper methods, and pinned author metadata identify Day 7; GEO characteristics alone say Day 18 for these eight donor-1 single/control samples.

models.best_single_oracle: best target-matched constituent single with identity and non-negative scale selected on the same donor triple
models.component_cone: in-sample donor-specific NNLS projection of the measured triple onto target-matched constituent singles; an oracle geometric diagnostic, not additivity validation
models.equal_sum: unit coefficient on each of the three component-single effects
models.lodo_component_cone: one shared NNLS coefficient vector fit on a training-control-selected gene mask by stacking only the three training donors and applied to the held donor's measured singles
models.lodo_training_selected_best_single: constituent identity and non-negative scale selected only on stacked training donors and frozen before scoring the held donor
models.on_target_calibrated_component_cone: coefficients fit only on the three on-target coordinates, frozen, and scored on the disjoint target-masked transcriptome; the 3x3 fit is a saturated calibration diagnostic
models.signed_least_squares: unconstrained least-squares upper-bound diagnostic on the three component singles
models.training_donor_mean_triple: arithmetic mean of the three training-donor measured triple effects
models.unrelated_cone: donor-specific NNLS projection on PTPN2, RASA2, and MED12 singles

module_error.reason: No preregistered module set was supplied; post hoc module selection would not be a valid holdout analysis.

saturated_calibration_diagnostic.interpretation: The three-atom cone is fit on only three on-target coordinates. Exact or near-exact interpolation is a saturated calibration diagnostic, not mechanistic, combination, or additivity validation.

certificate.scope: model-relative to this measured atom cone and masked gene metric

saturated_calibration_diagnostic.scope: three on-target coordinates fitted by three atoms

preprocessing.deposited_scale: author-normalized linear CPM (the deposited normalized-count values)
preprocessing.effect: constituent and unrelated singles minus the donor's AAVS1 mean; triple minus the donor's multiplex NTC
preprocessing.gene_filter: mean linear CPM across the 12 declared controls is >= the declared threshold; the canonical threshold is 1
preprocessing.linear_scale: use the deposited non-negative values as linear CPM; do not renormalize them a second time
preprocessing.single_control_baseline: within each donor, arithmetic mean of the two AAVS1-guide control log2(CPM + 1) profiles
preprocessing.triple_control_baseline: within each donor, the multiplex NTC log2(CPM + 1) profile

aavs1_guide_replicate_noise.definition: Guide1-versus-Guide2 uses target-masked log2(CPM+1) expression; normalized_rmse is ||Guide1-Guide2||/||Guide2||. Difference-norm ratios compare replicate noise with measured effect magnitudes.

D1.prediction_role: AAVS1 Guide1 expression predicts AAVS1 Guide2 expression

D2.prediction_role: AAVS1 Guide1 expression predicts AAVS1 Guide2 expression

D3.prediction_role: AAVS1 Guide1 expression predicts AAVS1 Guide2 expression

D4.prediction_role: AAVS1 Guide1 expression predicts AAVS1 Guide2 expression

reliability_diagnostics.interpretation: Low cross-donor effect cosine and sensitivity to the control-only expression filter limit transcriptome-wide reliability.

source.citation: Goudy et al., Integrated epigenetic and genetic programming of primary human T cells, Nature Biotechnology (2025)
source.redistribution: Raw GEO bytes remain gitignored and are not redistributed.
